allow: Bash(python -c "from resound.gateway import \(LLMGateway, LLMResponse, OpenRouterGateway, load_models_config, StageConfig, ModelsConfig, build_gateway, LLMGatewayError, LLMGatewayConfigError, LLMGatewayAuthError, LLMGatewayExhaustedError, LLMGatewayTimeoutError, LLMGatewayParseError\); from resound.gateway import __all__; print\('OK', len\(__all__\), 'exports'\); print\(sorted\(__all__\)\)")

Bash(python -c "from src.resound.config import load_brand_config, BrandConfig; print\('docstring head:', \(BrandConfig.__doc__ or ''\).splitlines\(\)[0]\); cfg = load_brand_config\('liquiddeath'\); print\('loaded brand:', cfg.slug\)")

PowerShell($content = Get-Content -Raw '.taskmaster/scripts/apply-task9-grilling.ps1'; $matches = [regex]::Matches\($content, "\(?s\)\\$details_9_\(\\d\) = @'\(.+?\)'@"\); foreach \($m in $matches\) { Write-Output \("details_9_" + $m.Groups[1].Value + ": " + $m.Groups[2].Value.Length + " chars"\) })

PowerShell($content = Get-Content -Raw '.taskmaster/scripts/apply-task9-grilling.ps1'; $pattern = '\(?s\)\\$details_9_\(\\d\) = @''\(.+?\)''@'; $matches = [regex]::Matches\($content, $pattern\); foreach \($m in $matches\) { Write-Output \("details_9_" + $m.Groups[1].Value + ": " + $m.Groups[2].Value.Length + " chars"\) })

PowerShell($content = Get-Content -Raw '.taskmaster/scripts/apply-task9-grilling.ps1'; $pattern = '\(?s\)\\$details_9_7 = @''\(.+?\)''@'; $m = [regex]::Match\($content, $pattern\); $body = $m.Groups[1].Value; $dq = \($body.ToCharArray\(\) | Where-Object { $_ -eq '"' }\).Count; $bs = \($body.ToCharArray\(\) | Where-Object { $_ -eq '\\' }\).Count; $nl = \([regex]::Matches\($body, "`n"\)\).Count; Write-Output \("double-quotes: $dq, backslashes: $bs, newlines: $nl"\))
